---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for QuizArena.
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected and how often? -->
<!-- e.g. "As a teacher, I can't reuse questions across quizzes, so I have to retype them every time." -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the feature clearly. What should it do? What does it look like? -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you thought of other ways to solve this? Why is your proposed solution better? -->

## Who Benefits
- [ ] Teachers
- [ ] Students
- [ ] Both

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any mockups, screenshots, links to similar features in other apps, or related issues. -->

## Willingness to Contribute
- [ ] I'm willing to open a PR for this feature.
